mapper.select: select * from nursing_item_record where customer_id = #{customerId} and del_flag = '0' order by nursing_item_record_id
mapper.update: update nursing_item_record set del_flag = '1' where customer_id = #{customerId} and del_flag = '0'
update nursing_item_record n set n.del_flag = '1' where n.nursing_item_record_id = #{id} and n.del_flag = '0'
